justification: Consumes the OS CSPRNG (via coding_adventures_csprng) for the master-key salt, per-record DEKs, and AEAD nonces. All other work is pure in-memory cryptography. No filesystem, no network, no process spawning. Wall-clock reads via std::time::SystemTime::now are informational only — their result is written into manifest metadata and never load-bearing for correctness.
